nodes.name: env.py
nodes.summary: Alembic migration environment configuring offline SQL-generation mode and online async-engine mode for running database migrations.

nodes.name: run_migrations_offline
nodes.summary: Configures Alembic to emit migration SQL against a literal database URL without opening a live connection.

nodes.name: run_async_migrations
nodes.summary: Creates an async SQLAlchemy engine and runs the migration scripts through a sync-mode callback bridge.

nodes.name: run_migrations_online
nodes.summary: Entry point invoked by Alembic's CLI to kick off the async online migration flow.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker file establishing app as a Python package.

nodes.name: _errors.py
nodes.summary: Shared helpers for detecting database constraint violations and mapping domain/database errors to HTTP responses, reused across API routers.

nodes.name: is_unique_violation
nodes.summary: Walks a SQLAlchemy IntegrityError's cause chain to detect whether it stems from a unique constraint violation.

nodes.name: map_error_to_http
nodes.summary: Translates a caught exception into an HTTPException using a code-to-status mapping, logging the failure before raising.

nodes.name: lots.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router for stock lot receiving: creating lots with line items, listing lots, and fetching lot detail, enforcing shop-scoped and role-based access.

nodes.name: create_lot
nodes.summary: Receives a new stock lot with one or more product lines, validates barcodes belong to the shop, writes a stock-in business log, and returns the created lot.

nodes.name: list_lots
nodes.summary: Lists received lots for a shop with pagination, most recently received first.

nodes.name: get_lot
nodes.summary: Fetches a single lot by ID scoped to the caller's shop, raising 404 if it does not exist.

nodes.name: _load_lines
nodes.summary: Refreshes a lot and eagerly loads its line items so the response can be serialized.

nodes.name: products.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router for product catalog management: creation, quick-add during checkout, listing, barcode lookup, updates, pending-product activation, and CSV bulk import.

nodes.name: create_product
nodes.summary: Creates a new active product for the caller's shop, mapping unique-barcode conflicts to an HTTP 409.

nodes.name: quick_add_product
nodes.summary: Cashier/receiver flow to quickly add a not-yet-priced product mid-checkout, recording its origin and honoring an idempotency key.

nodes.name: list_products
nodes.summary: Lists products for a shop with optional text search and active-only filtering, paginated.

nodes.name: lookup_product
nodes.summary: Looks up a single product by barcode within a shop, used when scanning items at checkout.

nodes.name: update_product
nodes.summary: Updates mutable fields (price, low-stock threshold, active flag) on an existing product.

nodes.name: list_pending_products
nodes.summary: Lists products awaiting owner review and price activation for a shop.

nodes.name: activate_product
nodes.summary: Owner activates a pending product by setting its final price and low-stock threshold, moving it out of the review queue.

nodes.name: import_products_csv
nodes.summary: Bulk-imports products from an uploaded CSV file, reporting per-row creation successes and validation failures.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel module re-exporting all SQLAlchemy ORM model classes (invoice, log, lot, product, shop, user) for convenient importing elsewhere in the app.

nodes.name: log.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy models for the append-only business event log, with joined-table-inheritance subclasses per log category (invoicing, stock-in, admin).
nodes.languageNotes: Uses SQLAlchemy joined-table inheritance: a shared _BaseLog table with per-category subclasses instead of a single polymorphic table.

nodes.name: _BaseLog
nodes.summary: Base log table columns shared by all log subtypes: shop, actor user, event type, JSON payload, and creation timestamp.

nodes.name: InvoicingLog
nodes.summary: Log subtype recording invoicing-related business events such as finalize, void request, void approve/reject.

nodes.name: StockinLog
nodes.summary: Log subtype recording stock-receiving (lot creation) events.

nodes.name: AdminLog
nodes.summary: Log subtype recording administrative events such as staff creation and password resets.

nodes.name: lot.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy models for received stock lots and their individual product line items.

nodes.name: Lot
nodes.summary: Represents a stock-receiving event for a shop, carrying reference/notes metadata and its constituent line items.

nodes.name: LotLine
nodes.summary: A single product-quantity line within a lot; sums of these lines contribute to a product's derivable current stock.

nodes.name: product.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy model and status enum for products (bottles) sold in the shop, including pending-approval lifecycle fields.

nodes.name: ProductStatus
nodes.summary: Enum of product lifecycle states, distinguishing active products from those pending owner review.

nodes.name: Product
nodes.summary: Core product entity with barcode, brand, size label, price, low-stock threshold, and active/pending-status flags, scoped to a shop.

nodes.name: lot.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schemas for lot receiving requests and responses, including validation that a lot's barcodes are not duplicated.

nodes.name: LotLineCreate
nodes.summary: Input schema for a single barcode+quantity line when creating a lot.

nodes.name: LotLinePublic
nodes.summary: Output schema representing a single lot line item in API responses.

nodes.name: LotCreate
nodes.summary: Input schema for creating a lot with multiple lines, validating that barcodes across lines are unique.

nodes.name: LotPublic
nodes.summary: Output schema representing a full received lot with its line items for API responses.

nodes.name: product.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schemas covering product creation, quick-add, updates, public responses, CSV import rows/results, and pending-product activation, with barcode and size-label validation.

nodes.name: ProductCreate
nodes.summary: Input schema for creating a full product, validating barcode has no whitespace and size label follows the expected shape.

nodes.name: ProductQuickAdd
nodes.summary: Input schema for the quick-add flow, requiring only barcode, brand, and size label at scan time.

nodes.name: ProductUpdate
nodes.summary: Partial-update schema for mutable product fields such as price and low-stock threshold.

nodes.name: ProductPublic
nodes.summary: Output schema for serializing a product to API consumers.

nodes.name: ProductImportRow
nodes.summary: Schema validating a single row from a bulk product CSV import.

nodes.name: PendingProductRow
nodes.summary: Output schema for a product awaiting owner review, including who added it and via what quick-add origin.

nodes.name: ProductActivate
nodes.summary: Input schema for activating a pending product with its final price and low-stock threshold.

nodes.name: low_stock.py
nodes.summary: Computes which active products in a shop have fallen at or below their low-stock threshold, using derived stock levels from lot receipts and invoice lines.

nodes.name: LowStockRow
nodes.summary: Value object pairing a product with its current derived stock and effective low-stock threshold.

nodes.name: compute_low_stock
nodes.summary: Queries active products for a shop, computes each product's current derived stock, filters to those at or below the effective threshold, and returns them sorted most-urgent-first.

nodes.name: test_checkout.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the checkout/finalize flow: multi-line invoices, split payments, idempotency-key replay, concurrent finalizes, role permissions, invoice immutability, business logging, and PDF invoice generation.

nodes.name: _seed_product
nodes.summary: Test helper that creates a product via the API and returns its parsed JSON.

nodes.name: _seed_lot
nodes.summary: Test helper that receives a stock lot with the given barcode/quantity items via the receiver API.

nodes.name: test_lots.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for lot receiving: creation with single/multiple lines, role permissions, shop scoping, unknown-barcode rejection, stock-in logging, and derived stock updates.

nodes.name: _create_product
nodes.summary: Test helper that creates a product via the API and returns its parsed JSON.

nodes.name: test_voids.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for invoice void, void-request, approve, and reject flows, covering pre- and post-EOD sign-off scenarios, stock restoration, and business event logging.

nodes.name: _seed_product
nodes.summary: Test helper that creates a product via the API and returns its parsed JSON.

nodes.name: _seed_lot
nodes.summary: Test helper that receives a stock lot with the given barcode/quantity items via the receiver API.

nodes.name: _finalize
nodes.summary: Test helper that finalizes a one-line cash checkout for a given barcode, quantity, and amount, returning the created invoice.

nodes.name: _mark_signed_off
nodes.summary: Test helper that marks an invoice's business day as signed off directly via the DB session, bypassing the API.

nodes.name: auth.py
nodes.summary: Authentication router providing superadmin login, shop-scoped staff login (by phone or staff ID), and a shop-staff listing endpoint used by the login UI.

nodes.name: _authenticate
nodes.summary: Shared credential-check helper that looks up an active user by a given identifier field/value within an optional shop scope and verifies the password against allowed roles.

nodes.name: login_superadmin
nodes.summary: Endpoint authenticating the platform superadmin by username/password and issuing a JWT access token.

nodes.name: login_shop
nodes.summary: Endpoint authenticating shop staff via either phone+password or staff-ID+password payload shapes, validating the raw body against the matching schema and issuing a JWT.

nodes.name: list_shop_staff
nodes.summary: Public endpoint listing active shop-scoped staff members (for the single-shop deployment) to populate a staff picker on the login screen.

nodes.name: deps.py
nodes.summary: Core FastAPI dependency providers: DB session injection, current-user resolution from JWT, role-based access guards, and shop-scope resolution helpers shared by nearly every router.

nodes.name: db_session
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency yielding an async DB session for request handlers.

nodes.name: get_current_user
nodes.summary: Decodes the bearer JWT, loads and validates the corresponding active user, and returns it as the authenticated principal for downstream handlers.

nodes.name: require_role
nodes.summary: Dependency factory returning a guard that rejects requests unless the current user's role is in an allowed set.

nodes.name: resolve_write_shop_id
nodes.summary: Resolves and authorizes the target shop ID for write operations, ensuring shop-scoped staff cannot write outside their own shop while superadmins may specify any shop.

nodes.name: resolve_read_shop_id
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective shop ID for read operations based on the current user's scope and an optional requested shop ID.

nodes.name: require_shop_scope
nodes.summary: Guard ensuring the current user is bound to a specific shop (rejects unscoped superadmin access where a shop context is mandatory).

nodes.name: staff.py
nodes.summary: API endpoints letting shop owners create staff accounts, list existing staff, and reset a staff member's password.

nodes.name: create_staff
nodes.summary: Owner-only endpoint creating a new staff user scoped to the resolved shop, hashing the password and handling unique-constraint violations on username/phone.

nodes.name: list_staff
nodes.summary: Owner-only endpoint listing all staff users for the caller's shop.

nodes.name: reset_staff_password
nodes.summary: Owner-only endpoint resetting a specific staff member's password within the caller's shop scope.

nodes.name: users.py
nodes.summary: Small router exposing a single endpoint returning the currently authenticated user's public profile.

nodes.name: me
nodes.summary: Returns the current authenticated user as a public-safe representation.

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Command-line entry point for operational bootstrap tasks: creating the first superadmin account and provisioning new shops with an initial owner account.

nodes.name: _createsuperadmin
nodes.summary: Creates the initial superadmin user in the database (idempotent if one already exists), hashing the supplied password before persisting.

nodes.name: _createshop
nodes.summary: Provisions a new shop record and its initial owner user in a single transaction, rolling back and exiting on failure.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI argument parser and dispatcher that prompts interactively for credentials and invokes the superadmin or shop-creation routines via asyncio.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Centralized application settings loaded from environment variables (database URL, JWT secret/algorithm/TTL, bcrypt rounds, CORS origins, low-stock check interval) via pydantic-settings.

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.summary: Pydantic settings model declaring all environment-driven configuration values for the application.

nodes.name: get_settings
nodes.summary: Cached factory returning the singleton Settings instance, used throughout the codebase as the single source of configuration.

nodes.name: db.py
nodes.summary: Database engine and session management module: builds the async SQLAlchemy engine and sessionmaker from settings, exposes the get_db FastAPI dependency, a unit_of_work context manager, the declarative Base, and init_db for schema bootstrap.

nodes.name: Base
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy declarative base class that all ORM models in the project inherit from.

nodes.name: get_engine
nodes.summary: Lazily creates and caches the async SQLAlchemy engine using the configured database URL, applying pool settings appropriate for the deployment environment.

nodes.name: get_sessionmaker
nodes.summary: Returns a cached async sessionmaker bound to the shared engine.

nodes.name: reset_engine
nodes.summary: Disposes of the cached engine and sessionmaker, used to reset database state between test runs or environment changes.

nodes.name: get_db
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency yielding a scoped async DB session per request and rolling it back on error.

nodes.name: unit_of_work
nodes.summary: Async context manager wrapping a block of DB operations in a single commit/rollback transaction boundary.

nodes.name: init_db
nodes.summary: Creates all database tables from the ORM metadata; used by CLI bootstrap flows and tests.

nodes.name: user.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy model defining shop staff users, their role enum (superadmin, owner, receiver, cashier), and shop-scoping relationship.

nodes.name: UserRole
nodes.summary: Enumeration of user roles (superadmin, owner, receiver, cashier) used throughout authorization checks.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: ORM model representing a shop staff account with credentials, role, active flag, and shop association, used across authentication and staff-management flows.

nodes.name: auth.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic request/response schemas for authentication and staff management: login payload variants, token responses, public user views, staff-picker entries, and staff create/reset requests with phone/role validators.

nodes.name: SuperAdminLoginRequest
nodes.summary: Request schema for superadmin username/password login.

nodes.name: ShopLoginByPhone
nodes.summary: Request schema for shop staff login via phone number, with a validator normalizing/validating phone format.

nodes.name: ShopLoginByStaffId
nodes.summary: Request schema for shop staff login via numeric staff ID and password.

nodes.name: TokenResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema wrapping an issued JWT access token, its type/expiry, and the authenticated user's public profile.

nodes.name: UserPublic
nodes.summary: Public-safe serialization of a User record (excludes password hash) returned by auth and profile endpoints.

nodes.name: ShopStaffMember
nodes.summary: Minimal staff entry (id, name, role) used to populate the shop login staff-picker list.

nodes.name: StaffCreate
nodes.summary: Request schema for creating a new staff account, validating that the role is a shop-scoped role and normalizing the phone number.

nodes.name: StaffPasswordReset
nodes.summary: Request schema carrying the new password for a staff password reset operation.

nodes.name: SuperAdminCreate
nodes.summary: Request schema for creating a superadmin account (username/password).

nodes.name: jwt.py
nodes.summary: JWT access-token creation and decoding utilities backed by application settings (secret, algorithm, TTL).

nodes.name: TokenError
nodes.summary: Exception raised when a JWT token fails to decode or validate.

nodes.name: create_access_token
nodes.summary: Builds and signs a JWT access token embedding subject, shop ID, role, and optional extra claims with a configurable expiry.

nodes.name: decode_access_token
nodes.summary: Verifies and decodes a JWT access token, raising TokenError on failure.

nodes.name: passwords.py
nodes.summary: Bcrypt-based password hashing and verification helpers used by authentication and staff-management flows.

nodes.name: hash_password
nodes.summary: Hashes a plaintext password with bcrypt using the configured cost factor.

nodes.name: verify_password
nodes.summary: Verifies a plaintext password against a bcrypt hash.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker file for the app.api package, making the api directory importable as a Python package.

nodes.name: _test_only.py
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder router mounted only under test app_env, kept so leftover test references to test-only endpoints still compile now that the real role-gated endpoints exist.
nodes.languageNotes: Docstring documents that its original placeholder role-gate endpoints were superseded by real endpoints in lots.py and checkout.py.

nodes.name: dashboard.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router exposing shop dashboard endpoints for EOD sign-off, EOD totals, sign-off history, pending void queue, and low-stock reporting, all scoped by shop and role.

nodes.name: health.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router providing liveness and readiness health-check endpoints, with readiness verifying database connectivity via a trivial query.

nodes.name: shops.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router for shop management: listing all shops (superadmin), fetching the caller's own shop, and updating shop settings like GSTIN and excise duty rate.

nodes.name: sign_off
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that signs off a shop's business day within a unit-of-work transaction, delegating to the sign_off_day service and mapping domain errors to HTTP responses.

nodes.name: eod_totals
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning revenue and payment-mode totals for a given business date and shop.

nodes.name: eod_history
nodes.summary: GET endpoint listing historical EOD sign-off records for a shop within an optional date range.

nodes.name: void_queue
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning the queue of invoices pending void approval for a shop.

nodes.name: low_stock
nodes.summary: GET endpoint computing and returning products currently below their effective low-stock threshold for a shop.

nodes.name: liveness
nodes.summary: Simple liveness probe endpoint returning a static OK status.

nodes.name: readiness
nodes.summary: Readiness probe endpoint that executes a trivial query against the database to confirm connectivity.

nodes.name: list_shops
nodes.summary: Superadmin-only endpoint listing all shops ordered by name.

nodes.name: get_my_shop
nodes.summary: Endpoint returning the caller's own shop details, resolving the effective shop id from the requesting user's scope.

nodes.name: update_my_shop
nodes.summary: Endpoint that updates mutable shop settings (name, GSTIN, excise duty rate, low-stock threshold) for the caller's shop and logs the change.

nodes.name: logging_config.py
nodes.summary: Configures structlog-based structured JSON logging for the application, integrating with the stdlib logging module and quieting noisy third-party loggers.
nodes.languageNotes: Bridges structlog processors into a stdlib ProcessorFormatter so both structlog and stdlib log records render as consistent JSON.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Application entry point that builds the FastAPI app: manages startup/shutdown lifespan (DB engine, background low-stock polling task), configures CORS middleware, and mounts all API routers.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an async context-manager lifespan handler to start/cancel a background asyncio task that periodically emits low-stock alerts per shop.

nodes.name: eod.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schemas for the EOD (end-of-day) dashboard API: sign-off requests/responses, totals breakdowns by payment mode, sign-off history, pending voids, and low-stock reporting.

nodes.name: shop.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic schemas for shop resources, including public and summary shop views and a shop-update payload with GSTIN format validation.

nodes.name: eod.py
nodes.summary: Service layer implementing end-of-day business logic: signing off a business day's invoices, computing revenue/payment totals, listing sign-off history, and listing invoices pending void approval.

nodes.name: configure_logging
nodes.summary: Sets up structlog processors, a JSON stdlib formatter, and root logger configuration, quieting known noisy third-party loggers.

nodes.name: get_logger
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper returning a structlog logger bound to the given name.

nodes.name: lifespan
nodes.summary: Async context-manager lifespan hook that configures logging, initializes the DB engine, starts the background low-stock polling task, and tears both down on shutdown.

nodes.name: _low_stock_loop
nodes.summary: Background asyncio loop that periodically queries all shops and computes/logs low-stock alerts for each, sleeping between iterations based on configured interval.

nodes.name: create_app
nodes.summary: Factory function constructing the FastAPI application instance, wiring up CORS middleware and mounting all feature routers (auth, checkout, dashboard, health, lots, products, shops, staff, users, voids, and test-only routes).

nodes.name: _day_bounds
nodes.summary: Helper computing the start/end datetime bounds for a given business date.

nodes.name: sign_off_day
nodes.summary: Signs off all unsigned invoices finalized on a business date for a shop, raising EodError for future dates or duplicate sign-offs, and records an EodSignOff entry.

nodes.name: get_day_totals
nodes.summary: Computes revenue, invoice/void/reversal counts, and payment totals broken down by payment mode for a shop's business date, including sign-off status.

nodes.name: list_signoff_history
nodes.summary: Queries EOD sign-off records for a shop within an optional date range, ordered most recent first and limited.

nodes.name: list_pending_voids
nodes.summary: Queries invoices in PENDING_VOID status for a shop, ordered by void request time.

nodes.name: SignOffRequest
nodes.summary: Request schema for EOD sign-off with a validator rejecting business dates too far in the past.

nodes.name: SignOffResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema describing a completed EOD sign-off result.

nodes.name: EodTotalsResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema for EOD totals including revenue, invoice/void/reversal counts, and per-payment-mode breakdown.

nodes.name: LowStockResponse
nodes.summary: Response schema wrapping the list of low-stock items and the evaluation timestamp.

nodes.name: ShopPublic
nodes.summary: Public representation of a shop including GSTIN, excise duty rate, and low-stock threshold default.

nodes.name: ShopUpdate
nodes.summary: Update payload schema for shop settings, validating GSTIN format via a field validator.

nodes.name: EodError
nodes.summary: Domain exception raised by the EOD service for invalid sign-off operations (e.g., future dates, duplicate sign-offs).

nodes.name: EodTotals
nodes.summary: Internal dataclass-like model representing computed EOD totals returned by get_day_totals.

nodes.name: checkout.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router exposing checkout endpoints: finalize a cart into an invoice, fetch invoice details, and download the invoice PDF, enforcing role and shop-scope checks.

nodes.name: finalize
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that resolves the write shop scope, delegates to finalize_checkout inside a unit of work, writes an invoicing business log, and returns the finalized invoice.

nodes.name: _load_invoice_or_404
nodes.summary: Loads an invoice with its lines and payments eagerly, raising 404 if not found.

nodes.name: get_invoice
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning invoice details for an authorized role.

nodes.name: get_invoice_pdf
nodes.summary: GET endpoint that renders and streams the invoice as a PDF using shop details.

nodes.name: voids.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router handling invoice void workflows: direct pre-EOD voids and the request/approve/reject flow for post-EOD voids, with business logging for each action.

nodes.name: _resolve_void_shop_id
nodes.summary: Resolves and authorizes the shop scope for a void action based on the invoice's shop_id.

nodes.name: request_void
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that either directly voids a pre-EOD invoice or files a post-EOD void request, logging the outcome.

nodes.name: approve_void
nodes.summary: POST endpoint for an owner to approve a pending post-EOD void request, creating a reversal invoice.

nodes.name: reject_void
nodes.summary: POST endpoint for an owner to reject a pending post-EOD void request, reverting the invoice to finalized status.

nodes.name: _load_invoice
nodes.summary: Loads an invoice scoped to a shop, raising a 404 if absent.

nodes.name: _not_found
nodes.summary: Builds a standard 404 HTTPException for missing invoices.

nodes.name: _write_void_log
nodes.summary: Writes a structured invoicing business log entry describing a void state transition.

nodes.name: invoice.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy ORM models for invoices, invoice lines, payments, end-of-day sign-offs, and idempotency keys underpinning the billing domain.

nodes.name: InvoiceStatus
nodes.summary: Enum of invoice lifecycle states (e.g. finalized, void-pending, voided, reversal).

nodes.name: PaymentMode
nodes.summary: Enum of accepted payment modes (e.g. cash, card, UPI) for invoice payments.

nodes.name: Invoice
nodes.summary: Core invoice entity capturing shop, cashier, status, totals, EOD sign-off state, void metadata, and related lines/payments.

nodes.name: InvoiceLine
nodes.summary: Line item on an invoice recording product, quantity, unit price, and computed line total.

nodes.name: Payment
nodes.summary: Payment record capturing mode and amount tendered against an invoice.

nodes.name: EodSignOff
nodes.summary: Record of an end-of-day sign-off event for a shop, including signer, business date, and count of invoices reconciled.

nodes.name: IdempotencyKey
nodes.summary: Tracks idempotency keys per shop mapped to invoices to safely dedupe replayed checkout requests.

nodes.name: checkout.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic request/response schemas for the checkout API: cart lines, payment inputs, and public invoice/payment representations.

nodes.name: CheckoutLine
nodes.summary: Request schema for a single cart line identified by barcode and quantity.

nodes.name: PaymentInput
nodes.summary: Request schema for a single tendered payment mode and amount.

nodes.name: CheckoutFinalizeRequest
nodes.summary: Top-level checkout finalize request body containing cart lines, payments, optional note and shop_id, with a validator ensuring payments have non-empty positive amounts.

nodes.name: InvoiceLinePublic
nodes.summary: Public response schema for an invoice line item.

nodes.name: PaymentPublic
nodes.summary: Public response schema for a payment record.

nodes.name: InvoicePublic
nodes.summary: Public response schema for a full invoice including lines and payments, used across checkout and void endpoints.

nodes.name: CheckoutFinalizeResponse
nodes.summary: Response wrapper pairing the finalized invoice with an is_replay flag for idempotent retries.

nodes.name: checkout.py
nodes.summary: Core checkout business logic: validates idempotency keys, resolves cart barcodes to products, locks and decrements stock, and creates the invoice, lines, and payments transactionally.

nodes.name: CheckoutError
nodes.summary: Domain exception raised for checkout validation failures, carrying an error code mapped to an HTTP status by the API layer.

nodes.name: CartLine
nodes.summary: Internal dataclass representing a single cart line by barcode and quantity for the service layer.

nodes.name: PaymentLine
nodes.summary: Internal dataclass representing a single payment mode/amount pair for the service layer.

nodes.name: FinalizeResult
nodes.summary: Result wrapper pairing the created or replayed invoice with an is_replay flag.

nodes.name: _check_idempotency_key_present
nodes.summary: Validates that an idempotency key header is present and non-blank, raising CheckoutError otherwise.

nodes.name: _is_today_signed_off
nodes.summary: Checks whether the shop's business day has already been EOD signed off, blocking new checkouts.

nodes.name: _resolve_products_for_cart
nodes.summary: Resolves cart barcodes to active Product rows for the shop, raising CheckoutError for unknown or duplicate barcodes.

nodes.name: finalize_checkout
nodes.summary: Transactionally finalizes a checkout: validates idempotency and payment totals, locks products and shop row, checks stock via compute_derived_stock, and creates the invoice with its lines and payments.

nodes.name: invoice_pdf.py
nodes.summary: Renders a finalized invoice as a printable PDF receipt using ReportLab, including line items, payment breakdown, and shop details.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ReportLab's SimpleDocTemplate/Table/Paragraph flowables to build a structured PDF document in-memory.

nodes.name: render_invoice_pdf
nodes.summary: Builds and returns the raw bytes of a PDF receipt for a given invoice, shop name, GSTIN, and excise duty rate.

nodes.name: voids.py
nodes.summary: Business logic for voiding invoices: direct pre-EOD voids that restore stock, and the post-EOD request/approve/reject workflow that creates reversal invoices.

nodes.name: VoidError
nodes.summary: Domain exception raised for void validation failures, carrying an error code mapped to HTTP status by the API layer.

nodes.name: VoidResult
nodes.summary: Result wrapper pairing the original invoice with an optional reversal invoice created during approval.

nodes.name: _load_invoice_for_void
nodes.summary: Loads an invoice scoped to a shop for void processing, raising VoidError if not found.

nodes.name: direct_void
nodes.summary: Directly voids a pre-EOD finalized invoice, restoring the underlying stock and marking it voided.

nodes.name: request_post_eod_void
nodes.summary: Files a void request against an already EOD-signed-off invoice, marking it pending owner approval.

nodes.name: approve_post_eod_void
nodes.summary: Owner approval of a pending post-EOD void: locks the shop row, creates a reversal invoice with negated lines and payments, and marks the original invoice voided.

nodes.name: reject_post_eod_void
nodes.summary: Owner rejection of a pending post-EOD void request, reverting the invoice back to finalized status.

nodes.name: test_eod.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for end-of-day sign-off, EOD totals reporting, sign-off history, and the void request queue, covering role restrictions and revenue exclusions for voided/reversal invoices.

nodes.name: _seed_product
nodes.summary: Test helper that creates a product via the API for use in EOD test scenarios.

nodes.name: _seed_lot
nodes.summary: Test helper that stocks in a lot of items via the receiver client.

nodes.summary: Reads and parses the queued finalize items from localStorage, defensively returning an empty array on missing or invalid data.

nodes.name: enqueueFinalize
nodes.summary: Adds (or replaces) a checkout finalize payload in the persisted offline queue, keyed by idempotency key, for later submission.

nodes.name: listQueued
nodes.summary: Returns the current list of queued finalize items, used to render pending offline sales in the UI.

nodes.name: clearQueued
nodes.summary: Removes a specific queued item (by key) from the persisted offline finalize queue, used when a user dismisses a failed queued sale.

nodes.name: flushQueue
nodes.summary: Attempts to submit every queued finalize request to the API, removing successful ones from the queue and collecting per-item success/failure outcomes for the caller.

nodes.name: useOnlineStatus
nodes.summary: Hook returning a boolean reflecting the browser's current network connectivity, updated live via online/offline event listeners.

nodes.name: useRetryQueue
nodes.summary: Hook that automatically flushes the offline finalize queue when the browser comes back online and on a periodic interval, tracking the count of pending items and invoking an onFlush callback with outcomes.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Vite application HTML shell that provides the root DOM mount point and loads the TypeScript entry module for the React SPA.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root project manifest for the barstock-frontend React/TypeScript SPA, declaring dependencies (React Router, React DOM), dev tooling (Vite, ESLint, Tailwind, Playwright, openapi-typescript) and scripts for dev, build, lint, API type generation, and e2e testing.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a gen:api script that runs openapi-typescript against a sibling ../openapi.json to generate src/api/schema.ts, tying the frontend build to an external API contract.

nodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for the application source code (compiler options plus include/exclude paths), separate from node tooling and e2e test configs.

nodes.name: tsconfig.e2e.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration scoped to Playwright end-to-end test files, with its own compiler options and include paths.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript solution file that references the app, node, and e2e project configs via TypeScript's project-references mechanism, enabling the composite build (tsc -b) used in the build script.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses TypeScript project references (files + references arrays) to compose multiple sub-tsconfigs into a single build graph.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for Node-side tooling (e.g. Vite config file), with its own compiler options and include paths distinct from the app and e2e configs.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: Flat ESLint configuration for the React/TypeScript frontend, wiring up TypeScript, React hooks, and React Refresh linting rules across the project.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright test runner configuration pointing at the e2e/ test directory, defining the base URL, Chromium project, retry/trace policy, and a webServer block that boots the built frontend against the FastAPI backend for CI.

nodes.name: postcss.config.cjs
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for the build pipeline.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet that loads Tailwind's base, components, and utilities layers and defines a few root-level style resets for the application.

nodes.name: tokens.ts
nodes.summary: Design token module exporting a shared `tokens` object (colors, spacing, and related design constants) consumed by the Tailwind configuration to keep styling consistent across the app.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Vite-generated ambient type declaration file that pulls in Vite's client types for the TypeScript compiler.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme using the shared design tokens module and sets the content paths for class scanning.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration wiring up the React plugin and dev server settings for the frontend application.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root application component that defines all client-side routes and wraps role-restricted pages in authentication/authorization guards.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a local Protected wrapper component to gate routes by role array before rendering an AuthedShell layout with Sidebar.

nodes.name: Protected
nodes.summary: Route guard component that checks the current user's role against an allowed list and redirects unauthorized users.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Top-level component that declares the full route table, mapping URL paths to pages and applying Protected role guards for restricted routes.

nodes.name: AuthProvider.tsx
nodes.summary: React context provider that manages the authenticated session (token, user, readiness), persists it to sessionStorage, and exposes login/logout and role-based home routing helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Restores session on mount from sessionStorage using decodeJwt/isExpired, clearing stale tokens automatically.

nodes.name: readSession
nodes.summary: Reads and validates a persisted JWT/user pair from sessionStorage, clearing them if the token is malformed or expired.

nodes.name: AuthProvider
nodes.summary: Context provider component that initializes session state, and exposes memoized login/logout callbacks to descendant components.

nodes.name: useAuth
nodes.summary: Hook that exposes the current auth context (token, user, login, logout) to consuming components.

nodes.name: homePathFor
nodes.summary: Maps a user role string to the default landing route for that role after login.

nodes.name: LoginPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Shop-staff login page using a PIN-pad style phone/password entry flow that authenticates against the API and redirects to the role-appropriate home page.

nodes.name: LoginPage
nodes.summary: Manages a two-stage (phone then password) PIN-pad login form, calls Api.loginShop, stores the session via useAuth's login, and navigates to the role's home path.

nodes.name: checkout.ts
nodes.summary: API client functions for finalizing a checkout, fetching an invoice by ID, and downloading invoice PDFs.

nodes.name: finalizeCheckout
nodes.summary: Submits a checkout payload with an idempotency key and shop scoping to finalize a sale via the API.

nodes.name: getInvoice
nodes.summary: Fetches a single invoice by its ID from the API.

nodes.name: pdfUrl
nodes.summary: Builds the absolute URL for an invoice's PDF resource given an optional base path.

nodes.name: downloadInvoicePdf
nodes.summary: Fetches an invoice PDF as a blob using an auth token and returns it for download or preview.

nodes.name: client.ts
nodes.summary: Core fetch wrapper used by every API module: attaches auth headers from session storage, serializes JSON bodies, and normalizes error responses via ApiError.
nodes.languageNotes: Centralizing fetch logic in a single api() helper avoids duplicating auth/header handling across every API module.

nodes.name: ApiError
nodes.summary: Custom Error subclass carrying an HTTP status code and parsed response body for failed API calls.

nodes.name: api
nodes.summary: Generic fetch wrapper that injects the bearer token, sets JSON headers, performs the request, and throws ApiError on non-OK responses.

nodes.name: dashboard.ts
nodes.summary: API calls for retrieving end-of-day totals, signing off the day, fetching EOD history, and listing low-stock items, all scoped by shop.

nodes.name: getEodTotals
nodes.summary: Fetches end-of-day payment and sales totals for an optional business date and shop.

nodes.name: signOffEod
nodes.summary: Submits an end-of-day sign-off for a business date and shop.

nodes.name: getEodHistory
nodes.summary: Fetches a limited history of past EOD sign-offs for a shop.

nodes.name: getLowStock
nodes.summary: Fetches the low-stock item alert list for a shop.

nodes.name: staff.ts
nodes.summary: API calls to list existing staff and create new staff members within a shop.

nodes.name: listStaff
nodes.summary: Fetches the list of staff members for the current shop.

nodes.name: createStaff
nodes.summary: Submits a new staff member payload scoped to a shop for creation.

nodes.name: DashboardPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Owner/manager dashboard page showing today's EOD totals, low-stock alerts, and sign-off history, with an action to sign off the business day.

nodes.name: DashboardPage
nodes.summary: Main dashboard component that loads EOD totals, low-stock data, and sign-off history for the current shop and renders KPI cards, a low-stock table, and sign-off controls.

nodes.name: KpiCard
nodes.summary: Presentational card component displaying a titled KPI value with optional subtext and accent color.

nodes.name: StaffPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Staff management page listing shop staff and providing a form to create new staff members with role, credentials, and PIN reset controls.

nodes.name: StaffPage
nodes.summary: Main staff page component that loads the staff list for the shop and handles creating new staff members via the CreateCard form.

nodes.name: CreateCard
nodes.summary: Form component collecting username, full name, phone, password, and role to submit a new staff creation request.

nodes.name: Field
nodes.summary: Reusable labeled input field component supporting type, required, and minLength props.

nodes.name: ResetPinButton
nodes.summary: Button component stub for resetting a staff member's PIN, currently surfacing a placeholder alert.

nodes.name: VoidApprovalsPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Page for shop managers to review pending invoice void requests and approve or reject each one.

nodes.name: VoidApprovalsPage
nodes.summary: Component that loads pending void requests for the shop and lets the manager approve or reject each with busy-state handling.

nodes.name: catalog.ts
nodes.summary: Client-side in-memory cache of active products keyed by barcode, used to resolve barcodes quickly during receiving and checkout without hitting the API on every scan.

nodes.name: lots.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for creating and listing inventory receiving lots, including a validated safe-create helper that surfaces friendly error messages.

nodes.name: products.ts
nodes.summary: API wrapper for listing, creating, updating products, and bulk-importing products from a CSV file upload.

nodes.name: ProductsPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Product management page offering list/create/import tabs for browsing, editing, creating, and bulk-importing shop products.
nodes.languageNotes: Composes several tab-scoped sub-components (ListTab, EditRow, CreateTab, Field, ImportTab) within a single file rather than splitting into separate modules.

nodes.name: ReceivingPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Receiving workflow page where staff scan or enter barcodes to build a lot of received inventory, adjust quantities, and submit the lot to the backend.

nodes.name: prefetchCatalog
nodes.summary: Fetches active products for a shop and populates the in-memory barcode-keyed cache, deduping concurrent calls via an in-flight promise.

nodes.name: resolveBarcode
nodes.summary: Resolves a scanned barcode to a catalog product, using the cache when warm and falling back to a direct API lookup.

nodes.name: invalidateCache
nodes.summary: Clears the in-memory catalog cache, forcing the next resolution to refetch from the API.

nodes.name: cacheSize
nodes.summary: Returns the number of entries currently held in the catalog cache, mainly for diagnostics.

nodes.name: createLot
nodes.summary: Sends a new receiving lot payload to the API for a given shop.

nodes.name: listRecentLots
nodes.summary: Fetches the most recently created receiving lots, up to a configurable limit.

nodes.name: resolveForReceiving
nodes.summary: Resolves a barcode to a product specifically for the receiving flow by delegating to the shared catalog barcode resolver.

nodes.name: LotValidationError
nodes.summary: Custom error type thrown when a receiving lot payload fails validation before being sent to the API.

nodes.name: createLotSafe
nodes.summary: Validates a lot payload and creates it via createLot, translating validation failures into a LotValidationError for the caller.

nodes.name: listProducts
nodes.summary: Fetches products from the API with optional search query and include-inactive filters.

nodes.name: createProduct
nodes.summary: Creates a new product for a shop via the API.

nodes.name: updateProduct
nodes.summary: Updates an existing product's fields by id via the API.

nodes.name: importProductsCsv
nodes.summary: Uploads a CSV file of products for bulk import via a multipart form request, attaching the shop id and auth token, and returns the import result summary.

nodes.name: ProductsPage
nodes.summary: Top-level products page component that switches between List, Create, and Import tabs.

nodes.name: ListTab
nodes.summary: Displays a searchable, filterable list of products with inline edit and reload support.

nodes.name: EditRow
nodes.summary: Inline edit form for a single product row, validating and saving changes via updateProduct and invalidating the catalog cache on success.

nodes.name: CreateTab
nodes.summary: Form for creating a new product with shop-scoped submission, validation, and cache invalidation after creation.

nodes.name: Field
nodes.summary: Small reusable labeled input field component supporting text and numeric types with validation attributes.

nodes.name: ImportTab
nodes.summary: CSV import form allowing shop staff to upload a product CSV file and view the import result, including any per-row errors.

nodes.name: ReceivingPage
nodes.summary: Full receiving workflow component: prefetches the catalog cache, lets staff add products to a lot by scanning barcodes, adjust quantities, and save the completed lot via createLotSafe.

nodes.name: shops.ts
nodes.summary: API client functions for shop data: listing all shops (superadmin), fetching the current/acting shop, and updating shop configuration (name, GSTIN, excise duty rate, low-stock threshold).

nodes.name: listShops
nodes.summary: Fetches the full list of shops from the backend, used by superadmins to populate the shop-scope picker.

nodes.name: getMyShop
nodes.summary: Fetches shop configuration for the current user's shop, optionally overriding with an explicit shopId for superadmin scoping.

nodes.name: updateMyShop
nodes.summary: Sends a PATCH request to update shop configuration fields, optionally scoped to a specific shopId for superadmin edits.

nodes.name: ShopScopeProvider.tsx
nodes.summary: React context provider that tracks which shop a superadmin is currently 'acting as', persisting the selection in sessionStorage and exposing it via the useShopScope hook.

nodes.name: ShopScopeProvider
nodes.summary: Provider component that holds the acting shop id in state, synchronizes it to sessionStorage, and exposes it plus a setter through context.

nodes.name: useShopScope
nodes.summary: Custom hook that reads the shop-scope context, giving components access to the currently acting shop id and its setter.

nodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Main application sidebar navigation component that filters visible menu items by the current user's role and provides logout functionality.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.summary: Renders the collapsible navigation sidebar, filtering nav items based on the authenticated user's roles and handling logout/navigation actions.

nodes.name: CheckoutPage.tsx
nodes.summary: The main point-of-sale checkout screen: scans/looks up items by barcode, manages cart and split payments, finalizes sales against the API with offline-queue fallback, and displays/downloads the resulting invoice.
nodes.languageNotes: Large single-component page mixing multiple concerns (cart state, payment splitting, barcode scanning, offline retry queue, invoice rendering) via numerous useState/useMemo/useCallback hooks rather than being decomposed into sub-components.

nodes.name: CheckoutPage
nodes.summary: Top-level checkout page component managing barcode-driven cart entry, split-payment collection, sale finalization with offline-queue fallback, queued-sale review, and post-sale invoice display/download.
